title: chaphets #2654
definition:
1) to delight in, take pleasure in, desire, be pleased with
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) of men
             1a1a) to take pleasure in, delight in
             1a1b) to delight, desire, be pleased to do
        1a2) of God
             1a2a) to delight in, have pleasure in
             1a2b) to be pleased to do
 2) to move, bend down
    2a) (Qal) to bend down
nasbUsage:

 2) to move, bend down
    2a) (Qal) to bend down

    NASB:  to delight in
